title: Bulbophyllum electrinum
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum electrinum is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Bulbophyllum and the family Orchidaceae. This classification is based on its unique characteristics, such as its flower shape and leaf structure. The species Bulbophyllum electrinum is also further categorized within the subfamily Epidendroideae. The classification of this orchid species helps in understanding its evolution and relationship with other orchids.
